Location: Technopark, Thiruvananthapuram, Kerala Company: Marvelloux Apps Pvt. Ltd. Employment Type: Full-Time, on-site Closing Date: 31, July 2026 Contact Email: hr@marvelloux.com

Role Overview

Marvelloux Apps Pvt. Ltd. is seeking a creative, confident, and camera-friendly Social Media Content Creator & Anchor to join our growing team. This role combines on-camera presentation and digital marketing content creation. The ideal candidate will host studio and academy videos, simplify and present concepts related to UI/UX Design and other courses, and create engaging, performance-driven content that strengthens brand awareness, audience engagement, and lead generation.

Key Responsibilities

  • Host and present videos, reels, podcasts, interviews, and live sessions related to UI/UX Design, other courses, career growth, and company culture.
  • Represent Marvelloux in workshops, webinars, student interactions, interviews, and promotional campaigns.
  • Create engaging short-form and long-form content for Instagram, LinkedIn, YouTube, Facebook, and other digital platforms.
  • Write compelling captions, content hooks, scripts, and marketing copy that drive engagement and conversions.
  • Collaborate with design, marketing, and academic teams to plan weekly and monthly content calendars.
  • Support the execution of digital marketing campaigns, academy promotions, events, and brand initiatives.
  • Monitor content performance, analyze insights, and optimize strategies to improve reach, engagement, and lead generation.
  • Stay updated with industry trends, social media best practices, and emerging content formats.
  • Ensure consistency in brand voice, messaging, and visual identity across all communication channels.

Requirements

  • Strong communication, presentation, and public-speaking skills.
  • Confident and professional on-camera presence.
  • Excellent command of English; Malayalam proficiency is an added advantage.
  • Basic understanding of digital marketing concepts and social media platforms.
  • Creative mindset with strong storytelling and content ideation abilities.
  • Interest in UI/UX Design, Digital Marketing, branding, and growth strategies.
  • Ability to work collaboratively in a fast-paced and creative environment.
  • Strong organizational skills and attention to detail.

Preferred Skills

  • Experience in content creation, anchoring, digital marketing, social media management, or influencer marketing.
  • Familiarity with tools such as Canva, CapCut, Meta Ads Manager, Google Analytics, or similar content and marketing platforms.
  • Portfolio, social media profile, or sample video content demonstrating presentation and content creation skills will be an added advantage.

What We Offer

  • A creative and growth-oriented work environment.
  • Opportunity to become the face of a fast-growing design and marketing brand.
  • Exposure to branding, performance marketing, content strategy, and digital campaigns.
  • Hands-on experience with UI/UX Design and Digital Marketing projects.
  • Career growth opportunities based on performance and contribution.

How to Apply

Interested candidates may share their updated resume and portfolio/sample video works (if available) to: Email: hr@marvelloux.com Subject: Application for Social Media Content Creator & Anchor
summary: Creative Social Media Content Creator & Anchor needed for Marvelloux Apps Pvt. Ltd. to host videos, create engaging content, and drive brand awareness through digital platforms.
